elements.original_description: Two cartoon parents standing side by side on a pure white background, both with confused expressions, holding hands and shrugging their shoulders. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of two cartoon parents standing side by side, holding hands and shrugging their shoulders, both with exaggerated confused expressions, on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, simple lines, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks, cinematic lighting for clear form, highly detailed, with a helpful, gentle emotional tone.
